mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET BUILD_NAME = #{buildName}, VS_RACE = #{vsRace}, PLAY_STYLE = #{playStyle}, HARASS_STYLE = #{harassStyle}, AGGRESSION = #{aggression}, MAX_TIER = #{maxTier}, PREFERRED_UNITS = #{preferredUnits}, PREFERRED_BUILDINGS = #{preferredBuildings}, WIN_COUNT = 0, LOSE_COUNT = 0 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS SET BUILD_ID = NULL WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET WIN_COUNT = WIN_COUNT + 1 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
UPDATE TBL_BUILDS SET LOSE_COUNT = LOSE_COUNT + 1 WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.BUILD_ID, b.USER_ID, b.BUILD_NAME, b.RACE, b.VS_RACE, NVL(b.PLAY_STYLE, 'AGGRESSIVE') AS PLAY_STYLE, NVL(b.HARASS_STYLE, 'NORMAL_HARASS') AS HARASS_STYLE, NVL(b.AGGRESSION, 'MID_MULTI') AS AGGRESSION, NVL(b.MAX_TIER, 3) AS MAX_TIER, NVL(b.WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(b.LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, b.PREFERRED_UNITS, b.PREFERRED_BUILDINGS, b.CREATED_AT, u.BUILD_UNIT_ID, u.PHASE, u.UNIT_ID, u.PRIORITY FROM TBL_BUILDS b LEFT JOIN TBL_BUILD_UNITS u ON b.BUILD_ID = u.BUILD_ID WHERE b.BUILD_ID = #{buildId} ORDER BY u.PHASE, u.PRIORITY

SELECT b.BUILD_ID, b.USER_ID, b.BUILD_NAME, b.RACE, b.VS_RACE, NVL(b.PLAY_STYLE, 'AGGRESSIVE') AS PLAY_STYLE, NVL(b.HARASS_STYLE, 'NORMAL_HARASS') AS HARASS_STYLE, NVL(b.AGGRESSION, 'MID_MULTI') AS AGGRESSION, NVL(b.MAX_TIER, 3) AS MAX_TIER, NVL(b.WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(b.LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, b.PREFERRED_UNITS, b.PREFERRED_BUILDINGS, b.CREATED_AT, u.BUILD_UNIT_ID, u.PHASE, u.UNIT_ID, u.PRIORITY FROM TBL_BUILDS b LEFT JOIN TBL_BUILD_UNITS u ON b.BUILD_ID = u.BUILD_ID WHERE b.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY b.BUILD_ID, u.PHASE, u.PRIORITY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BUILD_UNITS (BUILD_UNIT_ID, BUILD_ID, PHASE, UNIT_ID, PRIORITY) VALUES (SEQ_BUILD_UNITS.NEXTVAL, #{buildId}, #{phase}, #{unitId}, #{priority})
mapper.select: SELECT BUILD_UNIT_ID, BUILD_ID, PHASE, UNIT_ID, PRIORITY FROM TBL_BUILD_UNITS WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId} ORDER BY PHASE, PRIORITY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OWNED_BUILDS (OWNED_BUILD_SEQ, PLAYER_SEQ, BUILD_ID) VALUES (SEQ_OWNED_BUILDS.NEXTVAL, #{playerSeq}, #{buildId})
mapper.select: SELECT b.BUILD_ID, b.USER_ID, b.BUILD_NAME, b.RACE, b.VS_RACE, NVL(b.PLAY_STYLE, 'AGGRESSIVE') AS PLAY_STYLE, NVL(b.HARASS_STYLE, 'NORMAL_HARASS') AS HARASS_STYLE, NVL(b.AGGRESSION, 'MID_MULTI') AS AGGRESSION, NVL(b.MAX_TIER, 3) AS MAX_TIER, NVL(b.WIN_COUNT, 0) AS WIN_COUNT, NVL(b.LOSE_COUNT, 0) AS LOSE_COUNT, b.PREFERRED_UNITS, b.PREFERRED_BUILDINGS, b.CREATED_AT, u.BUILD_UNIT_ID, u.PHASE, u.UNIT_ID, u.PRIORITY FROM TBL_OWNED_BUILDS ob JOIN TBL_BUILDS b ON ob.BUILD_ID = b.BUILD_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_BUILD_UNITS u ON b.BUILD_ID = u.BUILD_ID WHERE ob.PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq} ORDER BY b.BUILD_ID, u.PHASE, u.PRIORITY
